message:
feat(spawn): integrate event logging and fix alerts config

Integrates the event logging framework into the spawn command to track
session creation events, and fixes the alerts config helper signature.

Spawn Integration:
- Import events package for session lifecycle tracking
- Pass recipeName through spawn call chain for event metadata
- Emit session_create event after successful spawn
- Event includes: session name, agent counts, recipe used, project dir

Alerts Fix:
- Add projectsDir parameter to ToConfigAlerts() signature
- Required for disk space monitoring in the correct directory
- Maintains backward compatibility by accepting the new parameter

Event Data Captured:
- Timestamp of session creation
- Session name and project directory
- Agent breakdown (claude, codex, gemini counts)
- Recipe name if one was used
- Auto-restart configuration state

This enables post-hoc analysis of session creation patterns and supports
debugging session configuration issues across time.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
